description: subdelegation off v01 with expires_at AFTER v01's expiry. v01 expires at 2026-04-29T12:00:00Z; this sub claims to extend authority to 2026-04-30T00:00:00Z. Verifier MUST reject with E_SUBDELEGATION_EXPIRES_EXTENDED per SUB-DELEGATION.md §2.2 step 3f.

expected.rejection_reason: v01.expires_at = 2026-04-29T12:00:00Z; this sub-delegation's expires_at = 2026-04-30T00:00:00Z (12 hours past). A child window MUST be contained within its parent's window. issued_at is fine (2026-04-23T12:00:00Z >= 2026-04-22T12:00:00Z); the failure is purely on expires_at.

harness_assertion: Step 3f fires before step 3g (scope) and step 3i (revocation), so this rejection is purely temporal. Conformant verifiers MUST return E_SUBDELEGATION_EXPIRES_EXTENDED.
